params.name: Quantum Radio
params.description:
On Dec 2, 1993 AD, scientists first proposed the concept of quantum network.

Quantum Radio has made teleportation a reality. It transmit the quantum state of an atom to another place and prepares another atom there while the original stays put. Its data is divided into classical data and quantum information, which are respectively transmitted through classical and quantum channels. After the receiver has obtained the data, a complete replica of the original can be prepared.

[Basic Info]
